name: Muslin Swaddle Baby Blanket - Rainbows - 3pk - Cloud Island™
description:
This 3-Pack of Muslin Swaddle Baby Blankets from Cloud Island™ makes a perfect addition to your baby's basics. The pack features three 47-inch square baby blankets — one adorned with a vibrant rainbow-arch print against a white backdrop, one with yellow plaid, and one with a white dash print against a brown background — offering charming swaddling options. Soft, breathable and warm, these multipurpose baby blankets are crafted from 100% muslin cotton for a gentle, oh-so-soft feel against their delicate skin.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
